subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen declareth: Thy letter hath been adorned with the ornament of the Divine Throne and hath attained unto the Most Holy Presence. Blessed is thy state [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید کتابت بطراز عرش مزین و بمحضر اقدس فائز گشت نیکو است حال
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
